 Override the develop command from setuptools so we can ensure that our
generated files (from build_src or build_scripts) are properly converted to real
files with filenames.
developc
NZ	build_src
inplaceZ
build_scripts)
reinitialize_commandZ
run_command
old_develop
install_for_development)
self
E/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/distutils/command/develop.pyr
develop.install_for_developmentN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__doc__r
setuptools.command.developr
